message:
docs(fastapi-core): clarify headers lowercase optimization

Updates documentation comments in request.rs to more accurately
describe the header lookup behavior:

- Clarify that allocation is avoided when lookup key is already lowercase
- Remove outdated reference to stack buffer implementation detail
- Remove outdated memchr comment (implementation still uses efficient scanning)

No functional changes - documentation accuracy only.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
